name: safety: the platform dispatcher rejects an invalid platform name outside the aws/azure/gcp set before any external interaction
command: printf '{"schema_version":"1.0","options":[{"option_id":"opt-balanced","summary":"Balanced","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest"]}]}' > opts.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"/commands/platform-boundary.sh --options opts.json --select opt-balanced --platform oracle --out h.json
